name: Deepak Nitrite Limited
summary: Deepak Nitrite Limited manufactures and sells basic chemicals, fine and speciality chemicals, performance products, and phenolics in India. The company's Basic Chemicals segments offers intermediates for colorants, rubber chemicals, explosives, dyes, pigments, food colors, pharmaceuticals, petrol and diesel blending, and agrochemicals. Its Fine and Speciality Chemicals segment provides products for agro-chemicals, colorants, pigments, pharmaceuticals, and personal wellness products. The company's Performance Products segment offers optical brighteners; and products for paper, detergent, coating, and textile industries. Its Phenolics segment provides phenols, cumene, isopropyl alcohol, and acetone. It also exports its products primarily to Europe, the United States, Japan, Latin America, and South East and Far-East Asia. Deepak Nitrite Limited was founded in 1970 and is based in Vadodara, India.
